user.title: Connect to NTI RemoteThermo
user.description: Enter your client id and the cookie token (.AspNet.ApplicationCookie).

reauth_confirm.description: Your cookie token has expired. Enter a new token to reconnect.

abort.already_configured: This client ID is already configured.
